fields.title: About
fields.content:
I (Gabriel Soler) started thinking about this app after a few conversations with the person in charge of the charity where I worked for 7 years. 

I realised there were many unique situations the therapy world needed to address, especially when dealing with room allocations, payments, and synchronisation across multiple clients, therapists, and rooms.

I actually learned to use Python and a web framework called Django (plus HTMX) to develop it. AI arrived while I was doing it, and it helped find information and performed one agentic action during translations. So I think I can say it has been crafted by hand, piece by piece.

I am a psychotherapist who is curious and enjoys developing new projects.

You can check out my personal page [here](https://www.gabrielsoler.co.uk)

fields.title: Data Policy
fields.content:
This app is managed by Gabriel Soler, as programmer and data controller.

The data here is considered yours; there is no tracking, no hidden data uses, nor hidden algorithms.

When a user cancels their account, all data associated with them is erased in a cascading manner.

There are options to export your session data from the site as CSV files.

The data is stored in Europe and passes through ClaudFlare.

The server is secure, and the frameworks used are reliable. As the App is currently in Beta, I am not taking responsability for any data loss or malicious actions by third parties.
